name: Ziti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 (14 1/2 oz.) cans whole tomatoes, undrained & chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground chuck and turkey in a Dutch oven over medium heat until browned, stirring to crumble. Drain and pat dry with paper towels; set aside.
2. Coat the pan with cooking spray; add onion, mushroom, bell pepper, and garlic. Sauté 4 minutes until tender.
3. Return turkey mixture to the pan, add water and the next 6 ingredients (parsley, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper, tomato paste). Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Add pasta; stir well.
6. Spoon into a 13" x 9" x 2-inch baking dish, cover with heavy aluminum foil. Make 3 slashes in the foil.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 50 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Uncover; top with cheese. Cover and let stand 5 minutes.
8. Makes 8 servings.
